quote:
The road of death is paved with fear; the traveler who hesitates finds the path unblocked.  

When the wind of war blows, the stone of humanity trembles with the weight of ten minutes.  

In the silence between opposing thunder, the most powerful word is 'wait'.  

Outfits move like silent drums, telling the story of a nation's rhythm without a single spoken word.  

Even the jaws of a beast may conceal human whispers; the quest is to dredge truth from the mire of echoes.  

The coal that feeds the world can also devour its guardians if the door remains ajar.  

When steel roars into a crowd, the calm of the city shatters like jade; only humility saves the one who steadies the wheel.
quote_preview: The road of death is paved with fear; the traveler who hesitates finds the path unblocked.
